div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5;

span.p: GitHub Actions: adds Deploy on top of the Checks workflow

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5;

span.p: Quality + test tooling (runs in CI only; uv sync --no-dev skips pytest/ruff on the server)

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5;

span.p: Schema + seed tooling (run by the deploy script on every deploy)

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5;

span.p: Backend: uvicorn under systemd, 127.0.0.1:8000, behind nginx

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5;

span.p: nginx 1.26 host package, public :80 and :443 (replaces the Vite dev server)

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5;

span.p: Orchestration: systemd + Docker Compose + uv, driven by the deploy script (no npm on the server)

span.p:
systemd
produce-backend.service
Restart=always, starts on boot, user deploy

Astral uv
uv sync --locked --no-dev, Python 3.14.2 venv
